subject: Create JSON schema validation files
description:
Create packages/schemas/json/ directory with 6 JSON schema files:
- source_document.json - validate source records
- text_unit.json - validate text units
- evidence_span.json - validate spans
- kg_entity.json, kg_edge.json - validate KG
- rag_answer.json - validate answer contract

Ensure schemas enforce evidence requirements and provenance chains.
